section.title: NAME
section.p: createCS - Create a collection space in a database instance.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Create a collection space in a database instance.

plentry.pd: Collection space name. Collection space names should be unique to each other in a database object.

Size of data page. The default value is 65536B.
Format Users can create a collection space with 2 parameters: name and pageSize.The parameter "name" is in the type of string. The parameter "pageSize" is in the type of 32-bit integer. ("<collection space name>",[pagesize])

ul.li: The parameter "name" should not be null string. It should not contain "." or "$". The length of it should not be greater than 127B.
Collection space names should be unique to each other in a database object.
When creating a collection space, users can specify the size of data page. It is unchangable afterward. The default value of it is 65536B.

section.title: Examples
section.p: Create a collection space named "foo" without specifying the size of data page.
Create a collection space named "foo" and specify the size of data page as 1024.
